    ProcessAboutContact
    How it worksREACH OUT → TREATMENT · 4 STEPS

    How E-beam processing works

    A simple, transparent process: reach out, discuss your requirements, agree a time - then visit and have your goods treated exactly as you need.

    Inside a partner facility
    01

    Reach out

    Call, WhatsApp, or send the contact form - tell us about your product and what you need done.

    You receiveA response within 24 business hours
    02

    Discuss your requirements

    Our team talks through your requirements in detail - material, quantities, and the right treatment - and answers all your questions.

    You receiveA clear plan and quote
    03

    Agree a time

    We fix a date and time that is feasible for both sides - scheduled around your production, not ours.

    You receiveA confirmed appointment
    04

    Visit & treat your goods

    Visit at the agreed time and have your goods treated exactly as discussed - you stay involved at every step.

    You receiveYour goods, treated as agreed
    Step 01 starts here

    Ready to get started?

    Send us your product details today - we'll discuss your requirements and agree a time that works for you.

    GemsPride

    Electron beam services across India - sterilization, polymer cross-linking, and gemstone enhancement, trusted by manufacturers nationwide.
